trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI at 57.4 — the lowest RSI among top-tier candidates, giving it the most room to run before overbought conditions; all three bullish signals present (MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) make it the cleanest momentum entry in the AI/semiconductor space.
Score 95 with MACD bullish crossover and price 7.2% above SMA-20; lower share price allows meaningful position sizing within remaining cash and adds tech hardware exposure as a complement to NVDA.

decisions.briefing: Markets were flat-to-slightly positive today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 up 0.3%, reflecting a neutral, directionless session with no major catalysts pushing either way. With 4 open slots and over $1,100 in cash, this is a clear deploy opportunity — sitting on idle cash in a functioning bull market costs us alpha. NVDA is the standout pick: score 95, RSI still in the mid-50s, meaning it hasn't run hot yet unlike most other top candidates sitting above 70 RSI.

market_education.summary_en: Today's flat +0.3% session across major indices reflected a digestion day following recent tech-driven gains, with investors holding positions rather than aggressively buying or selling. AI infrastructure spending narratives continued to support semiconductor and cloud names quietly in the background, keeping stocks like NVDA and CRM well-bid despite no fresh catalyst. With no major economic data releases or Fed commentary on the calendar, volume was light and price action stayed range-bound — a typical consolidation pattern after a strong momentum run.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股主要指數微漲0.3%，市場整體呈現消化整理格局，投資人在缺乏新催化劑的情況下靜待方向。AI基礎建設的資本支出題材持續支撐半導體與雲端相關股票，使NVDA及CRM等個股維持相對強勢。在無重大經濟數據或聯儲局官員發言的背景下，成交量偏淡，股價在區間內窄幅震盪，屬強勢上漲後的典型技術整理。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved recently, on a scale of 0–100. Readings between 55–70 are considered the 'momentum sweet spot' — the stock is trending up with buyers in control, but hasn't yet moved so far so fast that a pullback is likely. Above 70 is 'overbought,' meaning the run may be overextended; that's why we favored NVDA (RSI 57) over names like HOOD (RSI 92) today.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: RSI（相對強弱指數）衡量股價近期漲跌的速度與幅度，數值介於0至100之間。55至70的區間被視為「動能甜蜜區」——代表股票正在上升趨勢中，買方主導市場，但尚未過熱到容易回調的程度。超過70則代表「超買」，意味著漲勢可能已過度延伸。這正是今日選擇NVDA（RSI 57）而非HOOD（RSI 92）等個股的核心邏輯。
